description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbing around neckline, graphic on the front and graphic lettering on the backFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in warm water with like colors Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry on low Do not iron on print Do not dry clean Get ready to bring back the of Rock and Roll with this black free authority tee from bioworld. The graphic on the front is inspired by the great success of the queen in the world of rock. Pair this t-shirt with sneakers and light denims for that stylish look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
